sourcesContent:
export const artisans = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "Jean Paul Habimana",
    skill: "Plumbing",
    skillCategory: "plumbing",
    location: "Kigali",
    experience: 8,
    rating: 4.8,
    reviewCount: 34,
    available: true,
    hourlyRate: "5,000 RWF",
    phone: "+250 788 123 456",
    bio: "Expert in pipe installation, leak repairs, and bathroom fittings. Certified plumber with 8 years of professional experience across Kigali. Available for both emergency repairs and planned installations.",
    photo: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1621905251189-08b45d6a269e?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&crop=face",
    coverPhoto: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504328345606-18bbc8c9d7d1?w=900&h=400&fit=crop",
    portfolio: [
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1585771724684-38269d6639fd?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Bathroom renovation" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558618666-fcd25c85cd64?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Pipe installation" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563453392212-326f5e854473?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Kitchen plumbing" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1541888946425-d81bb19240f5?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Water heater setup" },
    ],
    reviews: [
      { name: "Alice Nzeyimana", initials: "AN", stars: 5, date: "Mar 2025", text: "Excellent work! Fixed our burst pipe within an hour. Very professional and left the area clean." },
      { name: "Bernard Karekezi", initials: "BK", stars: 5, date: "Feb 2025", text: "Fast, reliable and fairly priced. Installed our new bathroom fixtures perfectly. Highly recommended!" },
      { name: "Claudette Mukamurenzi", initials: "CM", stars: 4, date: "Jan 2025", text: "Good job on the kitchen pipes. Came on time and explained everything clearly." },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "Marie Uwimana",
    skill: "Tailoring",
    skillCategory: "tailoring",
    location: "Kigali",
    experience: 12,
    rating: 4.9,
    reviewCount: 56,
    available: true,
    hourlyRate: "4,000 RWF",
    phone: "+250 788 234 567",
    bio: "Specialist in custom clothing, alterations, and traditional Rwandan attire. 12 years of experience serving individuals, businesses, and wedding parties. Known for precision cuts and meeting deadlines.",
    photo: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1567401893414-76b7b1e5a7a5?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&crop=face",
    coverPhoto: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558769132-cb1aea458c5e?w=900&h=400&fit=crop",
    portfolio: [
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558769132-cb1aea458c5e?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Custom wedding dress" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1605518216938-7c31b7b14ad0?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Traditional attire" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1537832816519-689ad163238b?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Business suits" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523381210434-271e8be1f52b?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Children's wear" },
    ],
    reviews: [
      { name: "Denise Mukamana", initials: "DM", stars: 5, date: "Mar 2025", text: "Made a beautiful wedding outfit for me. Creative, precise and very punctual. Everyone complimented the dress!" },
      { name: "Eric Rutayisire", initials: "ER", stars: 5, date: "Feb 2025", text: "Altered my entire office wardrobe. Perfect fit on every piece. Will definitely come back." },
      { name: "Francine Ingabire", initials: "FI", stars: 5, date: "Jan 2025", text: "Best tailor in Kigali. Incredibly skilled with traditional Rwandan designs." },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: "Eric Nzeyimana",
    skill: "Electrical",
    skillCategory: "electrical",
    location: "Musanze",
    experience: 6,
    rating: 4.7,
    reviewCount: 29,
    available: false,
    hourlyRate: "6,000 RWF",
    phone: "+250 788 345 678",
    bio: "Licensed electrician handling wiring, solar panel installations, and electrical safety inspections. Serving Musanze and Northern Province. Certified by RURA.",
    photo: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540569014015-19a7be504e3a?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&crop=face",
    coverPhoto: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1621905251918-0ef534bfb91e?w=900&h=400&fit=crop",
    portfolio: [
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1621905251918-0ef534bfb91e?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Solar installation" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558618666-fcd25c85cd64?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Panel wiring" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497435334941-8c899a9abad3?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Home rewiring" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1567427018141-0584cfcbf1b8?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Safety inspection" },
    ],
    reviews: [
      { name: "Grace Tuyishime", initials: "GT", stars: 5, date: "Feb 2025", text: "Installed solar panels perfectly. Very knowledgeable and explained how the entire system works." },
      { name: "Henry Mugisha", initials: "HM", stars: 5, date: "Jan 2025", text: "Rewired our whole house safely. Thorough inspection before and after. Very professional." },
      { name: "Iris Kayitesi", initials: "IK", stars: 4, date: "Dec 2024", text: "Good work on our electrical panel. Took a bit longer than expected but quality is great." },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: "Samuel Munyaneza",
    skill: "Carpentry",
    skillCategory: "carpentry",
    location: "Huye",
    experience: 10,
    rating: 4.6,
    reviewCount: 41,
    available: true,
    hourlyRate: "5,500 RWF",
    phone: "+250 788 456 789",
    bio: "Custom furniture maker and structural carpenter. From kitchen cabinets to full-room furniture setups — quality craftsmanship guaranteed. Works with hardwood, softwood, and MDF.",
    photo: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504257432389-52343af06ae3?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&crop=face",
    coverPhoto: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556909172-54557c7e4fb7?w=900&h=400&fit=crop",
    portfolio: [
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556909172-54557c7e4fb7?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Custom wardrobe" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1555041469-a586c61ea9bc?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Living room furniture" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1538688525198-9b88f6f53126?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Kitchen cabinets" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1586023492125-27b2c045efd7?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Bedroom set" },
    ],
    reviews: [
      { name: "Jacqueline Uwase", initials: "JU", stars: 5, date: "Mar 2025", text: "Built amazing wardrobes for our entire house. Excellent craftsmanship and delivered on time!" },
      { name: "Kevin Ndikumana", initials: "KN", stars: 4, date: "Feb 2025", text: "Good quality furniture, reasonable pricing. The kitchen cabinets look fantastic." },
      { name: "Laeticia Musoni", initials: "LM", stars: 5, date: "Jan 2025", text: "Very skilled carpenter. Made custom bed frames and side tables exactly how we wanted them." },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: "Ange Mukamana",
    skill: "Welding",
    skillCategory: "welding",
    location: "Rubavu",
    experience: 7,
    rating: 4.5,
    reviewCount: 18,
    available: true,
    hourlyRate: "7,000 RWF",
    phone: "+250 788 567 890",
    bio: "Industrial and artistic welder with experience in security gates, window grilles, and metal structures. Handles mild steel, stainless steel, and aluminum. Serving Rubavu and surrounding areas.",
    photo: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1573497019940-1c28c88b4f3e?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&crop=face",
    coverPhoto: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504328345606-18bbc8c9d7d1?w=900&h=400&fit=crop",
    portfolio: [
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504328345606-18bbc8c9d7d1?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Security gate" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1581092580497-e0d23cbdf1dc?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Metal structure" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518611012118-696072aa579a?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Custom grilles" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565193566173-7a0ee3dbe261?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Staircase railing" },
    ],
    reviews: [
      { name: "Michel Uwingabire", initials: "MU", stars: 5, date: "Jan 2025", text: "Welded our security gate beautifully. Strong, clean finish and exactly what we wanted." },
      { name: "Nadine Kampire", initials: "NK", stars: 4, date: "Dec 2024", text: "Good work on our window grilles. Came prepared and finished within the day." },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: "Patrick Niyonzima",
    skill: "Painting",
    skillCategory: "painting",
    location: "Kigali",
    experience: 5,
    rating: 4.4,
    reviewCount: 22,
    available: true,
    hourlyRate: "3,500 RWF",
    phone: "+250 788 678 901",
    bio: "Interior and exterior painting specialist. Uses quality paints, ensures clean surface preparation and smooth finishes. Handles residential homes, offices, and commercial spaces.",
    photo: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&crop=face",
    coverPhoto: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1562259929-b4e1fd3aef09?w=900&h=400&fit=crop",
    portfolio: [
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1562259929-b4e1fd3aef09?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Living room painting" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1589939705384-5185137a7f0f?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Exterior walls" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1615529328331-f8917597711f?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Office interior" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1503387762-592deb58ef4e?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Decorative finish" },
    ],
    reviews: [
      { name: "Olive Umubyeyi", initials: "OU", stars: 5, date: "Feb 2025", text: "Painted our office beautifully. Very professional and left minimal mess. Will hire again." },
      { name: "Pierre Habimana", initials: "PH", stars: 4, date: "Jan 2025", text: "Amazing finish on our living room walls. Very patient and careful with furniture." },
      { name: "Rachel Ingabire", initials: "RI", stars: 4, date: "Dec 2024", text: "Good quality work on exterior walls. Finished on time as promised." },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    name: "Diane Nyiraneza",
    skill: "Masonry",
    skillCategory: "masonry",
    location: "Nyagatare",
    experience: 9,
    rating: 4.7,
    reviewCount: 31,
    available: false,
    hourlyRate: "6,500 RWF",
    phone: "+250 788 789 012",
    bio: "Experienced mason for house construction, floor tiling, plastering, and renovation projects. Works across Eastern Province. Known for precise and durable work.",
    photo: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580489944761-15a19d654956?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&crop=face",
    coverPhoto: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1541976590-713941681591?w=900&h=400&fit=crop",
    portfolio: [
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1541976590-713941681591?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Floor tiling" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1503387762-592deb58ef4e?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Wall plastering" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1486325212027-8081e485255e?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "House construction" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558618666-fcd25c85cd64?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Brick laying" },
    ],
    reviews: [
      { name: "Simon Nkurunziza", initials: "SN", stars: 5, date: "Mar 2025", text: "Tiled our entire house. Perfectly aligned, no cracks, great finish. Outstanding job!" },
      { name: "Therese Mukunde", initials: "TM", stars: 5, date: "Feb 2025", text: "Excellent plastering work. Very neat and the walls came out perfectly smooth." },
      { name: "Valence Uwimana", initials: "VU", stars: 4, date: "Jan 2025", text: "Renovated our bathroom and kitchen. Good work, will recommend to others." },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    name: "Robert Hakizimana",
    skill: "Mechanics",
    skillCategory: "mechanics",
    location: "Kigali",
    experience: 15,
    rating: 4.9,
    reviewCount: 67,
    available: true,
    hourlyRate: "8,000 RWF",
    phone: "+250 788 890 123",
    bio: "Master mechanic for all vehicle types. Engine overhauls, electrical diagnostics, brake systems, and general servicing. 15 years in automotive repair. Honest assessments, fair pricing.",
    photo: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534308143481-c55f00be8bd7?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&crop=face",
    coverPhoto: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1632823469850-2f77dd9c7f93?w=900&h=400&fit=crop",
    portfolio: [
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1632823469850-2f77dd9c7f93?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Engine repair" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1609220136736-443140cfeaa8?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Brake service" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1487754180451-c456f719a1fc?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Full inspection" },
      { img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c?w=400&h=300&fit=crop", caption: "Oil & filter change" },
    ],
    reviews: [
      { name: "Monica Uwanyirigira", initials: "MU", stars: 5, date: "Mar 2025", text: "Fixed my engine problem that nobody else could solve. Honest diagnosis and fair price. Best mechanic in Kigali!" },
      { name: "Nathan Tuyizere", initials: "NT", stars: 5, date: "Feb 2025", text: "Fast diagnosis and excellent repair. Very transparent about costs. Will always come here." },
      { name: "Odette Kayiranga", initials: "OK", stars: 5, date: "Jan 2025", text: "Serviced my car for over 3 years now. Always top quality work and very trustworthy." },
    ],
  },
];

export const categories = [
  { label: "Plumbing",   value: "plumbing",   img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1585771724684-38269d6639fd?w=300&h=200&fit=crop", count: 24 },
  { label: "Electrical", value: "electrical", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1621905251918-0ef534bfb91e?w=300&h=200&fit=crop", count: 18 },
  { label: "Carpentry",  value: "carpentry",  img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556909172-54557c7e4fb7?w=300&h=200&fit=crop", count: 31 },
  { label: "Tailoring",  value: "tailoring",  img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558769132-cb1aea458c5e?w=300&h=200&fit=crop", count: 15 },
  { label: "Welding",    value: "welding",    img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504328345606-18bbc8c9d7d1?w=300&h=200&fit=crop", count: 12 },
  { label: "Painting",   value: "painting",   img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1562259929-b4e1fd3aef09?w=300&h=200&fit=crop", count: 20 },
  { label: "Masonry",    value: "masonry",    img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1541976590-713941681591?w=300&h=200&fit=crop", count: 9  },
  { label: "Mechanics",  value: "mechanics",  img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1632823469850-2f77dd9c7f93?w=300&h=200&fit=crop", count: 27 },
];
